return(function(t,H,n,d,U,g,T,Z,A,O,z,u,B,E,I,S,r,e,X,k,m,a,W)Z,z,B,W,e,a,A,E,S,I,m,X,u,r,k,O={},function(t,q)local H=B(q)local n=function(n,d)return E(t,{n,d},q,H)end return n end,function(t)for q=388651-388650,#t,-111473+111474 do Z[t[q]]=Z[t[q]]+(117957+-117956)end if n then local E=n(true)local
